|
Start trial
Demo
Automate strategy, not just tasks. Become
unstoppable.
Marketing automation runs what you build. Autonomous marketing builds what you need. Set your goals, and watch Active Intelligence create breakthrough marketing for you.
Explore Active Intelligence
Stylized demo of using ActiveCampaign
Go to market 3x faster. Backed by real insights, not endless reports.
Explore our platform
Sum up and visualize my next campaign
Create a personalized SMS strategy
Build an optimized email campaign using my data
Show me progress toward my goals
Automate every marketing channel
Personalized email marketing
Building complex email flows, or just want to send your best newsletter yet? ActiveCampaign adapts to your goals.
Explore Email Marketing
WhatsApp automation
Meet customers where they are with WhatsApp automation that feels like a conversation, not a campaign.
Explore WhatsApp Messaging
Powerful SMS messaging
Build always-on campaigns that drive action, with personalized SMS messages that land in seconds.
Explore SMS Marketing
1,000+ app integrations
Connect your entire marketing stack. From CRM to ecommerce, social media to analytics—autonomous marketing works with the tools you already use.
Explore Integrations
Helping thousands of teams punch above their weight
I felt overwhelmed, but with the AI tools, that hesitant feeling completely went away.
ActiveCampaign has done such a good job of putting the right AI tools in front of us—things that we actually want and need.
ActiveCampaign’s AI tools have taken the guesswork out of email marketing. Now we don’t need external help, and we get better results.
We saw a 20% engagement rate growth over six months and we knew we were doing something right.
Between two emails we did over $76,000 in revenue, largely thanks to ActiveCampaign forms, tagging, and automation.
30-Day Guarantee
See results in 30 days or get your
money back
We’re so confident you’ll grow with us, we’ll give you a full refund if you’re not satisfied after 30 days.
Start your free trial

We - and our partners - use cookies to deliver our services and to show you ads.
By using our website, you agree to the use of cookies as described in our
Cookie Policy (in English)
Accept
Privacy Preference Center
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
More information
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.    All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages.    If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms.    You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites.    They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
Other
Other
Additional first-party and/or third-party cookies.

We - and our partners - use cookies to deliver our services and to show you ads.
By using our website, you agree to the use of cookies as described in our
Cookie Policy (in English)
Accept
Privacy Preference Center
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
More information
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.    All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages.    If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms.    You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites.    They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
Other
Other
Additional first-party and/or third-party cookies.

Release Notes
Explore the latest updates and enhancements to ActiveCampaign.
Account, Billing, & Setup
Manage your account settings, billing information, and learn about partner programs.
ActiveCampaign HQ
ActiveCampaign HQ helps multi-location brands and franchises deliver consistent experiences at scale with personalized content for local customers.
ActiveCampaign Mobile Apps & Extensions
Learn how to manage your ActiveCampaign from your phone and manage sales communications from your inbox.
AI

WhatsApp Messaging
Use ActiveCampaign WhatsApp Messaging as part of your cross-channel strategy to deliver a personalized, real-time customer experience. Build richer connections at scale with automation capabilities built specifically for WhatsApp.

Integrate your entire tech stack with custom apps

API documentation
Create or update a listing
We’re here to help
Help center
Help Docs
Get instructions, troubleshooting tips, and best practices to effectively use platform features to your advantage.
FAQs
Common questions about ActiveCampaign’s products, features, privacy, setup, billing, and account.
Request Help
Still stuck? Have more questions? Reach out to our support team and we’ll guide you through your issue.
Send Feedback
Share your thoughts, pain-points, suggestions, and ideas to help shape the future of ActiveCampaign.
Frequently asked questions
How can I use ActiveCampaign integrations to improve reporting and analytics?
ActiveCampaign works with tools like Google Sheets to make reporting faster and more flexible. You can automatically send contact, deal, or campaign data into a live spreadsheet to build custom reports, track performance, or blend data with other business metrics without needing manual exports. Combined with analytics tools like Looker Studio or BigQuery, you get full visibility into your marketing performance.
Do I need technical skills to set up integrations?
No coding required.
Most integrations connect in just a few clicks through our native connections or Zapier. Our
AI Campaign Builder
can even suggest which integrations to activate based on your business goals and existing tech stack. For Developers, we offer deeper API access, a low-code solution called
App Studio
, and webhook capabilities for custom client solutions.
Can I migrate my existing integrations from my current tool?
Yes. ActiveCampaign supports most major integrations available in competitors, plus many specialized tools that competitors don’t offer. Our onboarding specialists can help migrate your current automations, contact lists, and more to ActiveCampaign, often improving efficiency through our AI automation capabilities. Most customers find they can reduce their tech stack while gaining more powerful cross-channel orchestration.
How do integrations enable cross-channel marketing?
ActiveCampaign’s integrations allow you to
create a unified customer view where you can combine email marketing, SMS, website tracking, WhatsApp Messaging, and more
.
You can trigger automations based on actions within connected apps—like a purchase in Shopify, a support ticket in Zendesk, or a call log in Salesforce. These triggers can instantly launch cross-channel campaigns. This is autonomous marketing in action: your systems work together without manual intervention.
Example: When someone browses your connected Shopify or Wix store, our AI can automatically trigger a personalized email sequence, schedule an SMS follow-up, and adjust your Facebook ad targeting—all from a single workflow.
What’s the difference between native integrations and API access?
Our 1,000+ apps and integrations include many native integrations that work out of the box with pre-built features and require no development. The
ActiveCampaign API
provides unlimited flexibility for custom builds, allowing developers and agencies to create bespoke solutions for unique business needs. Both options leverage Active Intelligence to automate marketing decisions and execution across your connected tools.
Is it complicated or time-consuming to set up a new integration?
Not at all. We prioritize a frictionless setup so you can focus on building your campaigns, not troubleshooting connections. For hundreds of popular tools, the connection process is typically a simple
​
“
connect” button or copy-and-paste of an API key, allowing you to get up and running in minutes. You don’t need to be a developer to link critical apps like your CRM, e‑commerce platform, or lead generation tools.
What if I don’t see the specific, niche, or custom tool I use on the Apps page?
ActiveCampaign is designed to be the hub of your entire tech stack, even for unlisted or proprietary tools. You can use our comprehensive
Developer Tools
and
API documentation
to build your own custom connector. We also have a network of
Certified Consultants
available to help you build and implement integrations for unique systems, ensuring you can leverage ActiveCampaign’s power with any application your business relies on.
Ready to take ActiveCampaign for a spin?
Try it free for 14 days.
Free 14-day trial with email sign-up
Email address
Get started
Join thousands of customers. No credit card needed. Instant setup.

analysis.name: ActiveCampaign
analysis.tagline: Cut 13 hours of marketing busywork each week with autonomous marketing.
analysis.value_proposition: An all-in-one marketing automation and CRM platform with autonomous AI that builds and optimizes campaigns across email, SMS, and WhatsApp.
analysis.ideal_customer: Small-to-mid-sized marketing teams that need multi-channel automation without a dedicated ops person — ecommerce, SaaS, agencies, franchises, and creators.

features.name: marketing automation
features.description: Visual multi-step automation builder that sequences emails, SMS, CRM actions, and more based on contact behavior and triggers.
features.evidence_quote: Multi-step marketing automation

features.name: email marketing
features.description: Campaign creation, scheduling, and deliverability tooling including newsletters and broadcast sends.
features.evidence_quote: Email Marketing

features.name: active intelligence
features.description: Autonomous AI layer that sets goals, generates campaigns, and optimizes marketing without manual configuration.
features.evidence_quote: Set your goals, and watch Active Intelligence create breakthrough marketing for you.

features.name: ai-powered automation builder
features.description: AI assistant that constructs automation workflows from natural-language goals.
features.evidence_quote: AI-powered automation builder

features.name: ai campaign builder
features.description: AI that generates complete email campaigns from user-defined objectives and existing data.
features.evidence_quote: AI campaign builder

features.name: generative ai content creation
features.description: AI-generated copy for emails, SMS, and campaigns.
features.evidence_quote: Generative AI

features.name: active intelligence workspace and sidebar
features.description: In-app AI workspace and contextual sidebar for querying data, building campaigns, and reviewing progress.
features.evidence_quote: Active Intelligence workspace and sidebar

features.name: whatsapp messaging
features.description: WhatsApp channel with automation support and a unified chat inbox.
features.evidence_quote: Meet customers where they are with WhatsApp automation that feels like a conversation, not a campaign.

features.name: sms marketing
features.description: Personalized SMS campaigns integrated with marketing automation flows.
features.evidence_quote: Build always-on campaigns that drive action, with personalized SMS messages that land in seconds.

features.name: transactional email
features.description: Automated transactional sends (receipts, password resets, order confirmations) via a dedicated sending channel.
features.evidence_quote: Transactional Email — Automate receipts, password resets, and more

features.name: crm
features.description: Built-in deal and pipeline CRM for tracking sales opportunities and contact relationships.
features.evidence_quote: Learn the building blocks of the ActiveCampaign CRM to create and manage pipelines

features.name: crm pipelines add-on
features.description: Enhanced CRM pipelines available as a paid add-on beyond the base CRM.
features.evidence_quote: Boost our CRM with two add-ons: Pipelines and sales engagement

features.name: sales engagement add-on
features.description: Sales engagement tooling (sequences, outreach) available as a CRM add-on.
features.evidence_quote: Boost our CRM with two add-ons: Pipelines and sales engagement

features.name: contact segmentation
features.description: Tag- and behavior-based segmentation for targeting automation and campaigns to specific contact subsets.
features.evidence_quote: Segmentation — Premium / Advanced / Standard / Limited across tiers

features.name: contact management
features.description: Add, import, tag, and manage contacts; includes list hygiene and subscription management.
features.evidence_quote: Add and manage contacts, learn about segmenting, and keep your lists clean.

features.name: landing pages
features.description: Built-in landing page builder for lead capture and campaign conversion.
features.evidence_quote: Landing pages

features.name: signup forms
features.description: Embeddable and hosted signup forms with double opt-in support.
features.evidence_quote: How to enable double opt-in for your ActiveCampaign form

features.name: double opt-in
features.description: Configurable double opt-in confirmation flow for list signups.
features.evidence_quote: Double opt-in is turned on if you create a form that uses the 'Subscribes to a list' form action

features.name: site tracking
features.description: JavaScript-based website visitor tracking that feeds contact behavior into automation and segmentation.
features.evidence_quote: Site Tracking allows ActiveCampaign to 'see' and track visitors' activity on your website.

features.name: predictive sending
features.description: ML-based send-time optimization that delivers emails when each contact is most likely to open.
features.evidence_quote: Predictive sending

features.name: predictive content
features.description: AI-selected content blocks that vary per contact based on predicted preferences.
features.evidence_quote: Predictive & conditional content

features.name: conditional content
features.description: Dynamic email content blocks that show/hide based on contact attributes or segment membership.
features.evidence_quote: Predictive & conditional content

features.name: attribution & conversion tracking
features.description: Multi-touch attribution that ties revenue and conversions back to campaigns and automations.
features.evidence_quote: Attribution & conversion tracking

features.name: custom reports
features.description: User-configurable reporting dashboards for detailed performance analysis.
features.evidence_quote: Custom Reports can give you the detailed data you need to confident...

features.name: business goals
features.description: Trackable growth goals within the platform; active goal limits vary by tier (15–200).
features.evidence_quote: Business Goals — 200 active goals (Enterprise/Pro) / 25 (Plus) / 15 (Starter)

features.name: sso
features.description: Single Sign-On via SAML or OIDC for enterprise account access control.
features.evidence_quote: Single Sign-On (SSO)

features.name: custom objects
features.description: User-defined data objects that extend the contact/deal schema for complex data models.
features.evidence_quote: Custom objects

features.name: dedicated account team
features.description: Named account management and support team assigned at the Enterprise tier.
features.evidence_quote: Dedicated account team

features.name: browse abandonment automation
features.description: Triggers automation sequences when a contact browses a product/page but doesn't convert.
features.evidence_quote: Browse Abandonment Automation, now available for all customers on Plus and...

features.name: ecommerce integrations
features.description: Deep ecommerce data sync (orders, products, revenue) with Shopify, WooCommerce, and others.
features.evidence_quote: Integrate with your favorite apps and access the marketing tools you need to grow your ecommerce business.

features.name: cross-channel marketing
features.description: Coordinated campaign execution across email, SMS, WhatsApp, and ads from a single platform.
features.evidence_quote: Cross-channel marketing

features.name: unified chat inbox
features.description: Combined inbox for WhatsApp conversations with automation and contact record context.
features.evidence_quote: WhatsApp Messaging — A unified chat inbox with powerful automation

features.name: mobile app
features.description: iOS/Android app for managing contacts, tasks, and sales communications on the go.
features.evidence_quote: ActiveCampaign mobile app makes it easy to view and manage contact information, reach out to contacts

features.name: api
features.description: REST API for building custom integrations and extending platform data.
features.evidence_quote: The ActiveCampaign API is used to enable integrations between your ActiveCampaign account and 3rd party services

features.name: activecampaign hq
features.description: Multi-location and franchise management layer for delivering consistent yet locally personalized experiences at scale.
features.evidence_quote: ActiveCampaign HQ helps multi-location brands and franchises deliver consistent experiences at scale

features.name: certified consultants network
features.description: Directory of vetted implementation and strategy consultants available for hire.
features.evidence_quote: Certified Consultants

features.name: automation templates
features.description: Pre-built automation and email templates for common use cases.
features.evidence_quote: Templates

features.name: ai claude and chatgpt integration
features.description: Native connectors to Claude and ChatGPT for AI-assisted tasks inside the platform.
features.evidence_quote: Connect AI Tools — Connect to Claude and ChatGPT

features.name: partner program
features.description: Revenue-sharing partner and affiliate program for agencies, channel partners, and app developers.
features.evidence_quote: Become an ActiveCampaign's Partner — Earn revenue as a partner

features.name: 30-day money-back guarantee
features.description: Full refund if results not achieved within 30 days of paid subscription.
features.evidence_quote: See results in 30 days or get your money back

features.name: deliverability tools
features.description: Sender reputation management, bounce handling, and compliance features to maximize inbox placement.
features.evidence_quote: Send beautiful, personalized emails and learn about deliverability.

features.name: security checklist
features.description: In-app account security audit checklist covering authentication and access controls.
features.evidence_quote: Use the ActiveCampaign Security Checklist — see how protected your account is from security incidents

features.name: automation actions limit
features.description: Per-automation action cap: 5 actions on Starter, unlimited on Plus and above.
features.evidence_quote: 5 actions per automation (Starter) / Unlimited automation actions (Plus, Pro, Enterprise)

differentiators: Active Intelligence — autonomous AI that creates and optimizes marketing, not just executes instructions
Cut 13 hours of marketing busywork per week (claimed, with citation)
Go to market 3x faster backed by real insights
Native WhatsApp automation with unified inbox
Multi-location / franchise management via ActiveCampaign HQ
Contact-count-based pricing (not seat-based) enabling team growth without per-user cost

recent_ships.what: Browse Abandonment Automation — triggers re-engagement flows when contacts browse without converting; available on Plus and above
Active Intelligence — autonomous AI workspace, sidebar, AI automation builder, AI campaign builder (marked 'New' sitewide)
recent_ships.source: Landing page and pricing page 'New' label on Active Intelligence

praised: AI tools removing overwhelm: 'I felt overwhelmed, but with the AI tools, that hesitant feeling completely went away.'
Practical AI relevance: 'ActiveCampaign has done such a good job of putting the right AI tools in front of us—things that we actually want and need.'
Measurable results: 'We saw a 20% engagement rate growth over six months.'
Revenue impact: 'Between two emails we did over $76,000 in revenue, largely thanks to ActiveCampaign forms, tagging, and automation.'
Reduced external dependency: 'Now we don't need external help, and we get better results.'

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.headline_inclusions: Email marketing, marketing automation (5 actions/flow), limited segmentation, standard CRM, 1 user, 1,000 contacts

tiers.name: Plus
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited automation actions, landing pages, standard segmentation, standard CRM & ecommerce integrations, 1 user

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: Advanced segmentation, predictive/conditional content, attribution tracking, premium ecommerce integrations, 3 users

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Premium segmentation, custom objects, SSO, dedicated account team, premium CRM integrations, 5 users

pricing.notes: All prices are starting prices billed annually at 1,000 contacts; price scales with contact count up to >200,000. WhatsApp is a separate plan dimension (Email, WhatsApp, or Email+WhatsApp bundle). Enhanced CRM pipelines and sales engagement are paid add-ons. Users are capped per tier (1/1/3/5); additional users require upgrade or add-on. 14-day free trial available with email signup, no credit card required.
